LanguageData.Ammo_LightCannonShell_AP.label: light cannon shell (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_LightCannonShell_AP.description: Large caliber shell used by autocannons and anti-aircraft cannons.

LanguageData.Ammo_LightCannonShell_HE.description: Large caliber shell used by autocannons and anti-aircraft cannons.

LanguageData.Ammo_LightCannonShell_HE_TFuzed.descript: Large caliber shell used by autocannons and anti-aircraft cannons.
LanguageData.Ammo_LightCannonShell_Sabot.label: light cannon shell (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_LightCannonShell_Sabot.description: Large caliber shell used by autocannons and anti-aircraft cannons.
LanguageData.Ammo_HeavyCannonShell_HEAT.label: heavy cannon shell (HEAT)
LanguageData.Ammo_HeavyCannonShell_HEAT.description: High-caliber cannon shell typically used by anti-armor weaponry.
